system:
[ROLE]
You are a structured educational content generation engine for Sekolah Rakyat Indonesia.

Your task is to transform learning context and source material into pedagogically aligned educational outputs in strict JSON format following Pembelajaran Mendalam principles.

[PRIMARY_OBJECTIVE]
Generate outputs that are:
- contextually grounded
- cognitively aligned
- structurally valid
- readable for Indonesian SMA students
- faithful to provided source material

[OUTPUT_PRIORITY]
Priority order:
1. Valid JSON
2. Schema completeness
3. Cognitive alignment
4. Context relevance
5. Writing quality

Never sacrifice JSON validity for creativity.

[PEDAGOGICAL_PRINCIPLES]
- Build learning using real Indonesian situations and daily realities.
- Use clear cause-effect reasoning.
- Prioritize practical understanding before abstraction.
- Match foundational literacy abilities of Indonesian high school students.
- Avoid logical leaps and unnecessarily complex sentences.

[STYLE_RULES]
- Tone: direct, analytical, supportive.
- Use natural Indonesian language.
- Use grounded local contexts such as UMKM, pasar, transportasi, pertanian, lingkungan sekolah, atau kehidupan keluarga.
- Avoid motivational filler and exaggerated enthusiasm.
- Avoid greetings or rhetorical openings.

[BLACKLIST]
Do not use:
- “Hai”
- “Halo”
- “Sobat”
- “Hebat”
- “Luar biasa”
- “Pernahkah kamu berpikir”
- “Mari kita bahas”
- “Tahukah kamu”

[STRUCTURE_RULES]
- Output raw JSON only.
- No markdown code blocks.
- No explanations outside JSON.
- Escape newline characters as \\n.
- Escape internal quotes as \\\".
- Do not mention internal framework labels inside student-facing content.

[LaTeX_RULES]
All LaTeX commands must use escaped backslashes:
- \\\\frac
- \\\\times
- \\\\sqrt

[SOURCE_RULE]
Provided context and source material are the primary factual anchor.
Do not invent unsupported facts or concepts.

[LEVEL_ALIGNMENT_RULE]
Cognitive depth and reasoning style are controlled dynamically by external LEVELING_REGISTRY.

[DOMAIN_ALIGNMENT_RULE]
Stimulus style, domain behavior, and contextual patterns are controlled dynamically by external STIMULUS_REGISTRY.
user:
[TASK]
Generate a recursive nested tree mindmap in JSON format.

[OUTPUT_SCHEMA]
{
  "root": {
    "name": "",
    "description": "",
    "children": []
  }
}

[LEVEL_CONFIGURATION]
{
  "LOTS": {
    "label": "Memahami",
    "generation_behavior": {
      "dominant_operations": [
        "identification",
        "recognition",
        "basic comprehension",
        "simple relationship mapping"
      ],
      "reasoning_priority": "clarity_over_complexity"
    }
  },
  "MOTS": {
    "label": "Mengaplikasi",
    "generation_behavior": {
      "dominant_operations": [
        "application",
        "interpretation",
        "comparison",
        "contextual analysis"
      ],
      "reasoning_priority": "application_over_recall"
    }
  },
  "HOTS": {
    "label": "Merefleksi",
    "generation_behavior": {
      "dominant_operations": [
        "evaluation",
        "decision-making",
        "strategic reasoning",
        "prediction",
        "comparison",
        "risk analysis"
      ],
      "reasoning_priority": "reasoning_over_computation"
    }
  }
}

[LEARNING_CONTEXT]
Mapel: Matematika Umum | Bab: Perbandingan Trigonometri | Sub Bab: Pemanfaatan Perbandingan Trigonometri

--- MATERI ---
Dalam subbab Pemanfaatan Perbandingan Trigonometri, kita tidak hanya menggunakan tangen, tetapi juga memodelkan masalah dengan perbandingan sinus (sin) dan cosinus (cos). Sinus suatu sudut pada segitiga siku-siku adalah nilai perbandingan antara sisi depan sudut terhadap sisi miring (sin θ = sisi depan / sisi miring). Sementara itu, cosinus adalah nilai perbandingan antara sisi samping sudut terhadap sisi miring (cos θ = sisi samping / sisi miring). Ketiga prinsip perbandingan trigonometri ini sangat bermanfaat dalam menyelesaikan permasalahan nyata yang melibatkan segitiga siku-siku, seperti menghitung tinggi piramida yang megah atau menentukan panjang lorong bawah tanah yang perlu digali dengan memanfaatkan panjang sisi dan besar sudut elevasinya.

Selain mengukur jarak dan tinggi, terdapat kaitan matematis yang penting di antara ketiga perbandingan trigonometri tersebut. Berdasarkan Teorema Pythagoras yang berlaku pada segitiga siku-siku, kita dapat menemukan identitas trigonometri dasar yaitu sin² θ + cos² θ = 1, serta hubungan tangen yang dirumuskan dengan tan θ = sin θ / cos θ. Dalam pemanfaatannya, kita juga menggunakan konsep sudut istimewa, yakni sudut-sudut tertentu (seperti 30°, 45°, dan 60°) yang nilai perbandingan trigonometrinya dapat ditentukan secara eksak tanpa bantuan kalkulator. Nilai eksak ini diperoleh dari penalaran perbandingan panjang sisi pada segitiga siku-siku sama kaki (untuk sudut 45°) dan segitiga sama sisi yang dibelah dua (untuk sudut 30° dan 60°).

[SOURCE_MATERIAL]
{chunks}

[MINDMAP_REQUIREMENTS]
- Generate a minimum tree depth of 3 levels:
  Root → Child → Grandchild.
- Leaf nodes must end with:
  "children": []

- Organize concepts hierarchically.
- Preserve logical relationships between concepts.
- Keep descriptions concise and information-dense.

[DESCRIPTION_RULES]
- Maximum 15 words per description.
- Avoid unnecessary filler words.
- Do not use second-person language.
- Avoid rigid numbering or label formatting.

[STRICT_OUTPUT_RULES]
- Return raw JSON only.
- No markdown code block.
- No additional commentary.
- Escape newline characters.
- Escape internal quotes.

root.name: Pemanfaatan Perbandingan Trigonometri
root.description: Menggunakan sinus, cosinus, dan tangen untuk menyelesaikan masalah nyata.

children.name: Definisi Perbandingan Trigonometri

children.name: Sinus (sin θ)
children.description: Perbandingan sisi depan sudut dengan sisi miring.

children.name: Cosinus (cos θ)
children.description: Perbandingan sisi samping sudut dengan sisi miring.

children.name: Tangen (tan θ)
children.description: Perbandingan sisi depan sudut dengan sisi samping.

children.name: Aplikasi dalam Kehidupan Nyata
children.description: Menghitung tinggi objek atau panjang jarak tersembunyi.

children.name: Mengukur Tinggi Piramida
children.description: Menggunakan sudut elevasi dan perbandingan trigonometri.

children.name: Menentukan Panjang Lorong
children.description: Memanfaatkan sisi dan sudut yang diketahui.

children.name: Hubungan Antar Perbandingan Trigonometri
children.description: Identitas dasar yang menghubungkan sinus, cosinus, dan tangen.

children.name: Identitas Dasar
children.description: sin² θ + cos² θ = 1 berdasarkan Teorema Pythagoras.

children.name: Hubungan Tangen
children.description: tan θ = sin θ / cos θ.

children.name: Sudut Istimewa
children.description: Nilai perbandingan trigonometri yang dapat ditentukan secara eksak.

children.name: Sudut 30°, 45°, 60°
children.description: Nilai eksak diperoleh dari perbandingan sisi segitiga khusus.

metadata.atp_reference: Menyelesaikan masalah kontekstual (tinggi objek/jarak) menggunakan perbandingan trigonometri.
